docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER HERNANDEZ--MANAGER. ROGER HERANDEZ WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF 0.00 FEES SERVED SEP-03-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE, FRANCIS CEO OF HOME DEPOT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLAKE, FRANCIS CEO OF HOME DEPOT
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FRANCIS BLAKE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-20-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIAUBA, KARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME DEPOST AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FRANCIS BLAKE, CEO OF HOME DEPOT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. HOME DEPOT IS NAMED AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS THRU ITS REPRESENTATIVE, ROGER HERNANDEZ, REGIONAL MANAGER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RIAUBA, KARL AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE, FRANCIS CEO OF HOME DEPOT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER FROM HOME DEPOT TO KARL RIAUBA DATED 10-14-14 RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT HOME DEPOST
